calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR #7235.

R. Michael Lieberman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff The Granada, Inc., dba The Granada.
Tony Davidauskis, Manager of the Granada, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Manuel Ochoa, an individual.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 22, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff The Granada, Inc., dba The Granda, and against defendant Manuel Ochoa, an individual, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,477.00.
Holdover Damages - $330.00.

Total - $1,807.00.

Additionally, plaintiff The Granada, Inc., dba The Granada is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1000 Sutter Street, Room 812, San Francisco, CA. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: SRavinantapricha/D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Granada Inc. is present. Represented by Tony Davidauskis.
Attorney Michael Lieberman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant is not present at calendar call. Defendant showed up 50 minutes late.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearance by defendant.

The trial date of OCT-11-2011 remains on calendar.
